stories.title: ALL-STAR STARTERS REVEALED TOMORROW — FOX 7PM ET, PHASE 2 RESULTS IN

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The MLB All-Star starting lineups are announced tomorrow — July 4 at 7:30 PM ET on FOX.

Phase 2 voting closed yesterday at noon. Ernie Clement and Shohei Ohtani are locked in as Phase 1 auto-starters.

Tomorrow night we find out who starts beside them.

#MLB #AllStar

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Bobby Witt Jr. vs. Andrés Giménez. Brandon Marsh vs. five NL outfielders. Ben Rice vs. Vlad Guerrero Jr.

The Phase 2 battles are over. Tomorrow we find out who won.

All-Star starters announced July 4 at 7:30 PM ET on FOX.

#MLB #AllStar

article.headline: The All-Star Starters Come Out Tomorrow. Here's What We Know.

stories.title: HOME RUN DERBY FIELD — SCHWARBER IN, CAMINERO IN, FIELD TAKING SHAPE

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kyle Schwarber leads MLB with 30 home runs. The Home Run Derby is at his home park on July 13.

He says he's in — if his back holds and he makes the All-Star team. Both outcomes look likely.

Derby on Netflix. #Phillies #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Junior Caminero is the first player officially confirmed for the 2026 Home Run Derby.

The Tampa Bay Rays' 21-year-old has 28 HRs and was runner-up at last year's Derby.

July 13. Citizens Bank Park. Netflix.

#Rays #MLB

article.headline: Caminero Is In. Schwarber Is Close. The Netflix Derby Field Is Coming Together.

stories.title: MISIOROWSKI SKIPS ALL-STAR GAME — BREWERS PROTECTING THEIR ACE

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Jacob Misiorowski threw 105.5 mph against the Cubs on June 26.

The fastest pitch ever thrown by a starting pitcher in the Statcast era.

He owns 42 of the 50 fastest starting-pitcher pitches ever recorded. All in 2026.

#Brewers #MLB

stories.title: SKUBAL TRADE — BRAVES EMERGE AS FRONTRUNNER

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Atlanta Braves have emerged as a frontrunner for Tarik Skubal, per reporting.

They lost Spencer Strider earlier this season. They need a frontline starter. The August 3 deadline is 31 days away.

ESPN puts the odds of a Skubal trade at 85%.

#MLB #TradeDeadline

article.headline: The Braves Just Became the Frontrunner for Tarik Skubal

stories.title: JULY 4 BASEBALL — FOX DOUBLEHEADER, ALL-STAR REVEAL AT 7PM ET

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Your July 4 baseball schedule:

• 7:30 PM ET — All-Star starters announced live on FOX
• 8:08 PM ET — Cardinals at Cubs (FOX)
• 8:08 PM ET — Mets at Braves (FOX, regional)
• Sunday: all 15 MLB games on Peacock

Biggest baseball holiday in years.

#MLB
